LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 11, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6C. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPERATIVE PLEADING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 14, 2013. AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION, AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DOLORES CANEPA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANTS CLIFFORD AND ARRIOLA ON DATES CERTAIN IS GRANTED. PARTIES HAVING MET AND CONFERRED, THE FOLLOWING DATES ARE SET: TONY CLIFFORD WILL BE DEPOSED ON JANUARY 23, 2014. EDWIN ARRIOLA WILL BE DEPOSED ON JANUARY 27, 2014. THESE DATES SHALL NOT BE CHANGED EXCEPT BY FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Sara Church Reese of Gordon & Rees LLP (415-986-5900) appear for defendants Tony Clifford and Edwin Arriola opposing party. / Atty. Clarice Liu of Bragg & Kuluva appearance by CourtCall for defendant First National. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DOLORES CANEPA's Motion to compel depositions of defendants Clifford and Arriola on dates certain is granted. Parties having met and conferred, the following dates are set: Tony Clifford will be deposed on January 23, 2014. Edwin Arriola will be deposed on January 27, 2014. These dates shall not be changed except by further order of the court. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported.
